title: MDA-extended frontmatter fields
description: Reusable shape for MDA-extended fields. In .mda sources these MAY appear at the top level. In compiled outputs they MUST be nested under metadata.mda.* (with the same shape).

doc-id.description: Unique document identifier; UUID format recommended.

title.description: Free-text human-readable title. Distinct from `name` (which is a machine ID).

version.description: SemVer 2.0.0 string. MUST be quoted (no number coercion). MUST NOT include build metadata in v1.0.

relationships.description: Mirror of footnote relationship payloads. REQUIRED in compiled output when the source had relationship footnotes.
